title: Digital Brain Maturity
summary: Foundation maturity shows how identity, Source, memory, personality, and voice connect into one operational model map.

layers.label: Self-model
layers.description: The model has a canonical owner-bound identity, profile link, and private record chain.

layers.label: Axiomatic orientation
layers.description: Source Calibration provides the private baseline for agency, axioms, core beliefs, reflection, and regulation.

layers.label: Trait architecture
layers.description: Personality Calibration gives the model cognitive style, reflection tolerance, and response-pattern signals.

layers.label: Continuity memory
layers.description: Private memory will connect thoughts, posts, documents, and model history into retrievable continuity.

layers.label: Expression system
layers.description: Voice maturity will require verified owner samples, expression alignment, and controlled activation.
